user.title: Generac Mobile Link
user.description: Enter your Mobile Link username (email). You will be guided to log in and provide a cookie.

login_guidance.title: Login to Mobile Link
login_guidance.description:
1. Click the link below and log in to your Generac Mobile Link account (handle any CAPTCHA).

2. Open Developer Tools (F12) → Network tab.

3. Refresh the page.

4. Copy the entire **Cookie** header from any request to app.mobilelinkgen.com.

5. Paste it below.

reauth_guidance.title: Re-authenticate Mobile Link
reauth_guidance.description: Your session has expired. Please log in again and provide the new cookie.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to Mobile Link. Please check your cookie.
